## Summary

- describe the change
- explain why it is needed

## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/build_all.py`
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py"`
- [ ] docs or generated outputs updated if needed

## Safety and data handling

- [ ] no real genome-derived data included
- [ ] no secrets or credentials included
- [ ] confidence boundaries and caveats preserved where relevant
